senses.gloss: flask with an elongate neck of usually glass for liquids

etymology.text: From Middle Persian [script needed] (dōrak, dōlak). Also found in Classical Persian دوره (dōra, “winejug, scyphus, a kind of flask for measure”), Old Armenian դորակ (dorak, “a kind of liquid measure”), Classical Syriac ܕܰܘܪܩܳܐ ܪܘܡܝܐ (dawrəqā rōmāyā, “amphora with handles; a kind of measure of 80 Roman litres”).
